summary: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Order status update empty string to null conversion working correctly. Tested all order status transitions (Pending→Confirmed, Pending→Ready to Despatch with To Pay/Paid, Ready to Despatch→Shipped, Shipped→Delivered, Cancelled) via backend API tests (14/14 passed) and frontend UI verification.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: The fix in Orders.jsx (lines 261-270) correctly sanitizes empty strings to null for payment_amount and invoice_value fields before sending to API
OrderStatusUpdate Pydantic model correctly defines Optional[float] = None for payment_amount and invoice_value
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_order_status_update.py - Created comprehensive order status update tests
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed orders for testing status transitions (TEST_StatusUpdate_Customer, TEST_PaidMode_Customer, TEST_Cancel_Customer, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order status update bug fix verified. Key scenarios tested: 1) Pending→Confirmed (simple status change), 2) Pending→Ready to Despatch with To Pay mode (empty payment_amount), 3) Pending→Ready to Despatch with Paid mode (creates expense), 4) Ready to Despatch→Shipped (with tracking number), 5) Shipped→Delivered, 6) Cancellation with reason. Frontend sanitizes empty strings to null for numeric fields (payment_amount, invoice_value) before API call.

pending_to_ready_to_despatch_to_pay.details: With transport selection and To Pay payment mode - null payment_amount handled correctly

pending_to_ready_to_despatch_paid.details: With Paid payment mode - payment_amount stored, expense created on ship

empty_string_to_null_conversion.details: BUG FIX VERIFIED - empty strings for payment_amount and invoice_value converted to null

api_tests.test_01_create_test_order: PASS - Order created in pending status
api_tests.test_07_create_second_order_for_paid_mod: PASS - Order created for paid mode test
api_tests.test_08_update_to_ready_to_despatch_with: PASS - Paid mode with amount stored
api_tests.test_10_create_order_for_cancellation: PASS - Order created for cancel test

bug_fix_details.root_cause: Frontend was sending empty strings ('') for numeric fields (payment_amount, invoice_value) instead of null. Pydantic expects float or null, not empty string.
bug_fix_details.fix_description: Added sanitization in handleSaveOrder() to convert empty strings to null: payment_amount: updateForm.payment_amount === '' ? null : updateForm.payment_amount
bug_fix_details.verification: All backend tests pass with null values, UI tested with empty fields
